title: nyctelea micrantha
intro: Nyctelea micrantha, also known as the small-leaved nightshade, is a plant species belonging to the Solanaceae family. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Nyctelea micrantha include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce pain and inflammation. Herbal preparations of Nyctelea micrantha are typically made from the leaves and roots, and can be found in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions.
